# Heiwa

Heiwa is an iOS soundscape app for creating personal mixes for sleep, focus, reading, and relaxation.

## Discovery
- [Sitemap](https://www.heiwa.fun/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://www.heiwa.fun/robots.txt)

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://www.heiwa.fun/)
- [Sleep sounds](https://www.heiwa.fun/sleep-sounds)
- [Soundscape app](https://www.heiwa.fun/soundscape-app)
- [Rain sounds for sleep](https://www.heiwa.fun/rain-sounds-for-sleep)
- [Offline sleep sounds app](https://www.heiwa.fun/offline-sleep-sounds-app)
- [Sleep sounds app with timer](https://www.heiwa.fun/sleep-sounds-app-with-timer)
- [Brown noise and rain for sleep](https://www.heiwa.fun/brown-noise-and-rain-for-sleep)

## Guides
- [All guides](https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs)
- [Best sleep sounds](https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs/best-sleep-sounds-for-falling-asleep-faster)
- [How to create your own sleep sound mix](https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs/how-to-create-your-own-sleep-sound-mix)
- [White noise vs brown noise vs pink noise](https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs/white-noise-vs-brown-noise-vs-pink-noise)

- [Contact](https://www.heiwa.fun/contact)
- [Delete account](https://www.heiwa.fun/delete-account)
